info.title: lr-ai-coding-agent
info.description: Execute arbitrary prompts via coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

options.name: --prompt
options.description: The prompt to send to the coding agent.

options.name: --agent
options.description: Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).

options.name: --cli-path
options.description: Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.

options.name: --model
options.description: Model effort level or model ID. Use 'medium' (Sonnet) or 'high' (Opus) for Claude. Ignored for other agents.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.

options.name: --add-dir
options.description: Additional directories to make accessible to the agent. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --allow-all-paths
options.description: Allow the agent to access all file system paths without restriction.
